channel.title: Kevin's Morning Briefing
channel.description: A 45-60 minute daily morning show with bipartisan news coverage. Hosted by Maya and Jess featuring NPR, Fox News, local Tulsa coverage, Oklahoma state news, business updates, tech, weather, daily scripture, and a dream travel destination.
channel.itunes:author: Kevin Starr
channel.itunes:summary: Your daily morning briefing with balanced bipartisan news, local Oklahoma coverage, business, tech, weather, scripture, and travel inspiration. Hosted by Maya and Jess.

item.title: Morning Briefing - 2026-03-19
item.description: Daily morning briefing with bipartisan news (NPR + Fox News), Tulsa local news, Oklahoma state coverage, business, tech, weather, scripture, and travel destination. Hosted by Maya and Jess.
item.itunes:title: Morning Briefing - 2026-03-19
